findings_details.title: values() is deprecated in Kotlin 1.9+; use entries
findings_details.body: ConcernLevel.values().toList() uses the deprecated values() API. The project is on Kotlin 2.3.0, where values() has been superseded by the type-safe entries property (EnumEntries<ConcernLevel>) since Kotlin 1.9. The repo already follows the entries pattern — see Region.kt:22. Fix: replace ConcernLevel.values().toList() with ConcernLevel.entries.toList().
